title: Alignment / Misalignment — relationship-evaluation list (Emily, March 2026)
html:
Alignment / Misalignment — relationship-evaluation list (Emily, March 2026)

Source: 2026-03-24 Apple Note. Misalignment list only (Alignments header is empty) — Yahir cataloging the value/worldview gaps with what is almost certainly Emily Stevens in late March 2026, after the early March Austin visit.

TL;DR

  • Mental health gap: "Raising kids to think it's ok to use anti depressants instead of dealing with things structurally."
  • Self-expression gap: "Being ok with kids wearing furry tails bc it's a free display of their expression" — Yahir not endorsing.
  • Marriage philosophy gap: "View marriage as a restriction of freedom and don't view herself as a wife, whereas I see marriage as an anchoring and stability in something that is co-developing a legacy together." — direct values clash, very explicit.
  • Other-gender friendship gap: "She wants to hang out with all people. I feel like it is not in my best interest to hang out with the other gender that's straight because it can lead to complicated situations that I would like to avoid."
  • Long-term planning gap: "She doesn't think long-term... There isn't like, 'Oh let's set a goal and work towards it.' It's just meandering. Meandering is fine until it leads nowhere and you've done nothing."
  • Mission/spirituality gap: "Doesn't really support a spiritual journey and use that as a delusion... She just says that she can appreciate my confidence but not the mission necessarily." — the mission-not-shared finding.
  • Language gap: "They use the word 'retard'. It is negative in the end."
  • The "Alignments :" header is empty — listed but never populated. The note ends mid-thought.

Pattern observed

This is the framework-evaluation note for the Emily relationship — and structurally identical to the April 2024 Sam breakup prep doc: list-the-misalignments-as-process for working out whether to stay or leave. Sam = trust gap; Emily = values gap.

The empty "Alignments" header is the most revealing detail — Yahir started the misalignment list and either ran out of time or didn't have alignments to write. Either way, the data point: this relationship is being evaluated for exit.

Open questions

  • Did Yahir + Emily break up shortly after this? (As of vault creation 2026-04-26, Emily is still actively referenced — see 2026 04 27 rankett com and the corpus implies she's still in his orbit. So evaluation ≠ exit yet.)
  • Were any alignments ever added?
